text: I should be able to tap next or provide very easily feedback on how easy/hard it felt or write a note or whatever. [...] The bottom cluster now holds only: the new **EffortControl.swift** (a glass "Rate effort" capsule that morphs via `glassEffectID` inside a `GlassEffectContainer` into a drag scale ‚Äî calm‚Üíhot gradient track, knob, large live recoloring RPE value, selection tick at each 6‚Äì10 detent, light impact on commit, settling into a recolored committed state; drag is a `.highPriorityGesture` so it wins over the page swipe), the bigger reps stepper (now editing `session` directly), and a small Skip. `bottomReserve` retuned to `bottomInset + 168`. [...] | **Cool effort rating** | ‚úÖ "Rate effort" morphs into a draggable RPE dial: teal‚Üíred gradient, live recoloring value ("8 ¬∑ Hard"), haptic detents, amber Set button | [...] - **Cool effort rating** ‚Äî the three flat pills become a single glass control that morphs into a **draggable effort dial**: gradient track (teal‚Üíamber‚Üíred), a live RPE value that scales/recolors as you drag, haptic ticks at each detent, and a satisfying committed state.
